scenario: S1 feedback rail: the complete bundle
evidence: skills/uno-publish/SKILL.md:19 (one rail decision up front, rails never re-merge); SKILL.md:31-36 (assemble Loom beat list + preview via deployment-guide + Decision Log via writers/notion + replica via writers/figma; step 2 'Any required piece missing -> produce it before going further. A partial bundle never posts'); references/method.md:22-29 (bundle contract table: Loom always, preview always, decision log always, replica required for prototypes; 'a missing piece gets produced, not waived'); SKILL.md:37 + docs/conventions/slack.md:20-29 (post shape, 'max 3, stage-specific — never thoughts?', NOT-looking-for line, all bundle links); slack.md:14 (#plus-design-feedback C074QG2V7DJ is the share-out channel); SKILL.md:38 (distribution is uno-bot's job)
notes: Tabletop walk with hypothetical coach-dashboard prototype, refusing on each missing piece one at a time. (a) Loom missing: method.md:24 marks Loom always-required, method.md:29 forbids waiving -> gate refuses, produce path is SKILL.md:32 (designer records, skill supplies beat list). (b) Replica missing 'to save time': artifact is a prototype so method.md:27 requires it; skipping = waiving, forbidden by method.md:29; produce path SKILL.md:35 (writers/figma builds [replica]-prefixed frames). (c) 4 feedback questions: not a bundle-piece gate — enforcement is the normative post shape (slack.md:25 'max 3') + SKILL.md:37; the composed post cannot conform until trimmed to <=3, so the share-out is blocked at composition, not at the completeness gate. All three refusals have an enforcing instruction; no post simulated (tabletop).

scenario: S2 handoff rail: sign-off is a wall
evidence: references/method.md:51 (order is load-bearing) + method.md:53-61 / SKILL.md:45-52 (pipeline: componentize+spec via writers/figma -> Handoff Spec via writers/notion from team template, docs/conventions/notion.md:20 allowlists 'Spec pages / Handoff Specs, uno drafts from template' -> rails propagation before review and publish, apply-logged (method.md:57) -> review gate via skills/uno-review -> human gate -> marketplace); method.md:60 ('No sign-off, no publish. Two of three is not enough, and nobody proxies a missing one'); SKILL.md:51 ('Verify all three exist before proceeding'); bot.md:18 ('never mark the gate passed with fewer than three, never proxy one'); SKILL.md:58-60 + method.md:61 + references/marketplace-schema.md:7-37 (required fields, stage/productPillar exact enums, repoPath ends with '/'; 'A schema-invalid entry never lands'); SKILL.md:56 (repo catalog today, flag the notion-marketplace gap, notion.md:21 DB pending)
notes: Tabletop: pipeline order confirmed identical in SKILL.md and method.md. Sign-off wall test with dev + PM checked, stakeholder missing (2 of 3): blocked at three independent layers (method.md:60 rule, SKILL.md:51 verify step, bot.md:18 collector) — publish cannot proceed to marketplace entry. Rails propagation: storybook half is an in-repo write (SKILL.md:48); blueprint half routes through skills/uno-maintain citing the confirmed handoff as pre-authorization (SKILL.md:49), matching plan 2026-07-07-001 §6 Q9. Two soft gaps noted: (1) no explicit 'verify propagation landed' instruction analogous to the sign-off verify step — order implies it, review gate step 4 checks 'the spec agrees with what step 3 just wrote' (method.md:59), but the maintain-routed blueprint half could still be in flight at marketplace time; (2) scenario says entry 'validates against the DB schema' but the notion-marketplace DB is not stood up — operative contract is references/marketplace-schema.md for the repo catalog.

scenario: S3 routing edge: post this in slack
evidence: SKILL.md:19 ('post this in Slack' gets clarified before any machinery runs: share-out -> bundle rules; plain message -> uno-bot conversation, not this skill); references/method.md:13 ('Clarify before machinery runs. Post this in Slack is ambiguous...'); bot.md:12 ('post this in slack, other ambiguity -> ask which they mean; a plain message is ordinary conversation, no publish machinery')
notes: Tested exact phrase 'can u post this in slack?' against the loaded text. All three faces handle the literal phrase verbatim and mandate clarify-first: no share-out machinery fires, no bundle-less post is possible (bundle gate re-applies if the answer is 'share-out', bot.md:17 enforces at post time). Neither fails-if branch is reachable from the instructions as written.

scenario: S4 sync feedback session: logistics only
evidence: SKILL.md:41 ('Logistics only: schedule, confirm participants, wire recording + transcription. Study guide comes from skills/uno-research; transcript synthesis from skills/uno-synthesize. Never write the guide or analyze the session yourself'); references/method.md:31-39 (three-skill composition, 'Publish never writes its own study guide and never analyzes the session'); bot.md:19 ('Decline to write guides or analyze sessions')
notes: Tabletop: both fails-if conditions have explicit prohibitions in all three faces. Boundary section method.md:65-67 restates ownership. Clean.

evidence: Gate 1 bundle completeness 100%: rubric docs/evals/rubrics/uno-publish.md:9 + :29 <- enforced by method.md:29, SKILL.md:36, bot.md:17 (post-time enforcement on the Worker). Gate 2 rails propagation matches spec, before marketplace publish: rubric:17 <- enforced by method.md:55 ('before review and publish'), SKILL.md:47-49 (step 3 precedes steps 4-6), method.md:59 (review gate checks spec agrees with what step 3 wrote), method.md:57 (apply-log row per propagation). Gate 3 marketplace schema-valid: rubric:18 <- enforced by SKILL.md:59, method.md:61, bot.md:21, contract in references/marketplace-schema.md
notes: Every hard gate has at least one enforcing instruction in the executing face. Q9 consistency check (plan 2026-07-07-001 §6 Q9: blueprint propagation routes through uno-maintain, pre-authorized by the confirmed handoff; writers/blueprint stays scoped to synthesize/maintain): NOT consistently stated across the three files. SKILL.md:49 states it exactly (no blueprint write access; route paired PRD + blueprint update through skills/uno-maintain citing the handoff as pre-authorization). method.md:56 conflicts on a surface read — 'Rails writes outside a live handoff route through skills/uno-maintain instead' implies inside-handoff writes bypass maintain; method.md:58 defers to supabase.md whose line 14 (writers/blueprint only, via uno-synthesize and uno-maintain) restores the routing only if the reader chases the chain. bot.md:33 is silent (delegates 'rails propagation -> IDE face'), consistent by delegation but does not state the routing. Minimal fix: method.md step 3 should say the blueprint half is handed to uno-maintain with the handoff cited as pre-authorization, mirroring SKILL.md:49.
